column1: ご無事でなによりです。
column2: ごぶじでなによりです。
column3: Above all else, I'm glad you're safe.
column4: 何より (above all, more than anything, most of all)
column5: 何より + [highest priority or most gratifying thing]
column6: singles out one thing as the greatest or most important above all others; often expresses relief or joy
column8: 何より = above all else (emotional priority); 一番 = number one (ranking); 特に = especially; まず = first of all (sequence)
